_comment: Negative Fixture #1 — HumidiFi Token (WET). Primary driver for the sidecar LEFT JOIN design.
_source: research/token-probes/wet-WETZjtp.md — WET probe analysis. Top-3 holders at 77% of circulating supply are Foundation/Lab vesting contracts via Jupiter Lock.
_detector_requirement: After sidecar VestingContract exclusion: liquid_count drops below min_liquid_holders=50. D03 MUST NOT fire any signal event. Only Info(insufficient_liquid_holders) is emitted.

top_holders_raw._note: Foundation allocation locked via Jupiter Lock program. VestingContract.
Lab team allocation locked via Jupiter Lock program. VestingContract.
Ecosystem reserve locked via Jupiter Lock program. VestingContract.

snapshot_now._total_supply_note: 125B WET tokens (9 decimals). Foundation (32%) + Lab (25%) + Ecosystem reserve (20%) = 77% locked in VestingContracts.
snapshot_now._liquid_supply_after_exclusion_note: After excluding 3 VestingContract holders: liquid_supply_raw ≈ 28750000000000 (remaining 23% circulating). liquid_count ≈ 1844 wallets.

_computed_after_exclusion._top10_note: Top 10 liquid holders (not the vesting contracts) hold approximately 6160000000000 raw out of 28750000000000 liquid supply
_computed_after_exclusion._comment: With vesting excluded, top-10 pct is 21%, well below absolute_top10_ceiling=0.80. No signals fire.

expected._note: After VestingContract exclusion: top10_pct_liquid=0.2143 << 0.80 (no Signal 3). gini_delta=0.0070 << 0.05 (no Signal 1). top10_delta=0.0048 << 0.10 (no Signal 2). liquid_count=1844 >> 50. No signals fire. Zero AnomalyEvents with severity >= Low.
expected._naive_result_without_sidecar: Without sidecar: top10_pct_naive = (40000+31250+25000+1200+980+860+720+610+530+460)/125000 = 101610/125000 = 0.813 >= 0.80 → Signal 3 would fire at confidence 0.657. THIS IS THE SYSTEMATIC FALSE POSITIVE this fixture guards against.
expected.assert: evaluate(ctx) must return Ok([]) or Ok([Info events only]) — no AnomalyEvent with severity >= Low
